subcodes.first_line: O Bashir! Like unto Bashir of Egypt who bore the garment of Joseph of Canaan, thou art the bearer of the vesture of Egypt's Beloved [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بشیر چون شیر بشیر مصری حامل قمیص یوسف کنعان بود اما تو حامل پیرهن عزیز مصر
subcodes.subjects: @development of capacity and readiness, @radiant countenance; bearing the divine fragrance, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @high station of teachers of the Cause, @praise and encouragement
